mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM app_user WHERE role = 'GLOBAL_ADMIN' )
SELECT id, email, display_name, password_hash, role, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, email, display_name, password_hash, role, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (email, display_name, password_hash, role) VALUES (#{email}, #{displayName}, #{passwordHash}, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT token, user_id, expires_at FROM auth_token WHERE token = #{token}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_token (token, user_id, expires_at) VALUES (#{token}, #{userId}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT layout_id FROM user_factory_access WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY layout_id ASC
SELECT id, email, display_name, role, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user ORDER BY id ASC
